revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[:Category:1940年代廃止|1940年代廃止]] | <small>[[:Category:1939年廃止|1939年]]</small> - [[:Category:1940年廃止|1940年]] - :Category:1941...'

revision.text:
{{座標一覧}} {{Commons cat|1947 disestablishments}} [[:Category:1940年代廃止|1940年代廃止]] | <small>[[:Category:1939年廃止|1939年]]</small> - [[:Category:1940年廃止|1940年]] - [[:Category:1941年廃止|1941年]] - [[:Category:1942年廃止|1942年]] - [[:Category:1943年廃止|1943年]] - [[:Category:1944年廃止|1944年]] - [[:Category:1945年廃止|1945年]] - [[:Category:1946年廃止|1946年]] - [[:Category:1947年廃止|1947年]] - [[:Category:1948年廃止|1948年]] - [[:Category:1949年廃止|1949年]] - <small>[[:Category:1950年廃止|1950年]]</small> ------------- [[1947年]]に廃止・解散・倒産等されたもののカテゴリ。
[[Category:1947年|はいし]] [[Category:1940年代廃止|*7]] [[Category:20世紀廃止 (年別)|47]]

{{Discat|194|7}}
[[Category:20世紀廃止 (年別)|47]]

revision.comment: Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1947年廃止]] [[ar:Category:انحلالات سنة 1947]] [[az:Category:1947-ci ildə ləğv olunanlar]] [[ba:Category:1947 йылда юҡ булғандар]] [[be_x_old:Category:Зьніклі ў 1947 годзе]] [[be:Category:Зніклі ў 1947 годзе]] [[bn:Category:১৯৪৭-এ বিলুপ্ত]] [[ce:Category:1947 шарахь дӀайаьлларш]] [[ckb:Category:ھەڵوەشانەوەکانی ١٩٤٧]] [[commons:Category:1947 disestablishments]] [[cs:Category:Zaniklo 1947]] [[cy:Category:Dadsefydliadau 1947]] [[da:Category:Ophørt i 1947]] [[de:Category:Aufgelöst 1947]] [[eo:Category:Malaperis en 1947]] [[es:Category:Extinciones en 1947]] [[fa:Category:انحلال‌های ۱۹۴۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Disparition en 1947]] [[hy:Category:1947 կազմալուծումներ]] [[id:Category:Pembubaran tahun 1947]] [[is:Category:Lagt niður 1947]] [[ka:Category:1947 წელს გაუქმებულები]] [[ko:Category:1947년 폐지]] [[ku:Category:Hilweşînên 1947an]] [[la:Category:Dissoluta 1947]] [[mk:Category:Престаноци во 1947 година]] [[mn:Category:1947 онд татан буугдсан]] [[ms:Category:Pembubaran 1947]] [[nn:Category:Nedleggingar i 1947]] [[no:Category:Opphør i 1947]] [[pt:Category:Extinções em 1947]] [[ro:Category:Desființări în 1947]] [[ru:Category:Исчезли в 1947 году]] [[sh:Category:Prestanci 1947.]] [[simple:Category:1947 disestablishments]] [[sl:Category:Ukinitve leta 1947]] [[sv:Category:Upplösningar 1947]] [[te:Category:1947 పతనాలు]] [[th:Category:สิ้นสุดในปี พ.ศ. 2490]] [[tr:Category:1947'de feshedilmiş oluşumlar]] [[uk:Category:Зникли 1947]] [[ur:Category:1947ء کی تحلیلات]] [[vi:Category:Chấm dứt năm 1947]] [[zh:Category:1947年廢除]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:1947年に廃止された法]].

[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1947年廃止]] [[ar:Category:انحلالات سنة 1947]] [[az:Category:1947-ci ildə ləğv olunanlar]] [[ba:Category:1947 йылда юҡ булғандар]] [[be:Category:Зніклі ў 1947 годзе]] [[bn:Category:১৯৪৭-এ বিলুপ্ত]] [[ce:Category:1947 шарахь дӀайаьлларш]] [[ckb:Category:ھەڵوەشانەوەکانی ١٩٤٧]] [[commons:Category:1947 disestablishments]] [[cs:Category:Zaniklo 1947]] [[cy:Category:Dadsefydliadau 1947]] [[da:Category:Ophørt i 1947]] [[de:Category:Aufgelöst 1947]] [[eo:Category:Malaperis en 1947]] [[es:Category:Extinciones en 1947]] [[fa:Category:انحلال‌های ۱۹۴۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Disparition en 1947]] [[hy:Category:1947 կազմալուծումներ]] [[id:Category:Pembubaran tahun 1947]] [[is:Category:Lagt niður 1947]] [[ka:Category:1947 წელს გაუქმებულები]] [[ko:Category:1947년 폐지]] [[ku:Category:Hilweşînên 1947an]] [[la:Category:Dissoluta 1947]] [[mk:Category:Престаноци во 1947 година]] [[mn:Category:1947 онд татан буугдсан]] [[ms:Category:Pembubaran 1947]] [[nn:Category:Nedleggingar i 1947]] [[no:Category:Opphør i 1947]] [[pt:Category:Extinções em 1947]] [[ro:Category:Desființări în 1947]] [[ru:Category:Исчезли в 1947 году]] [[sh:Category:Prestanci 1947.]] [[simple:Category:1947 disestablishments]] [[sl:Category:Ukinitve leta 1947]] [[sv:Category:Upplösningar 1947]] [[te:Category:1947 పతనాలు]] [[th:Category:สิ้นสุดในปี พ.ศ. 2490]] [[tr:Category:1947'de feshedilmiş oluşumlar]] [[uk:Category:Зникли 1947]] [[ur:Category:1947ء کی تحلیلات]] [[vi:Category:Chấm dứt năm 1947]] [[zh:Category:1947年廢除]] [[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] {{translated page|ja|Category:1947年廃止|version=64207323|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "[[be_x_old:" to "[[sn:be_x_old:"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}}
[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]][[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]][[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]][[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]] [[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]] [[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]] [[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8142281)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8142281)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{(Dis)establishments in year category header}}
{{wikidata link|Q8142281}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1947 disestablishments]]
<!--categories-->
